title.en: A large number of True Monarchs and Half-Step T...

content.en:
A large number of True Monarchs and Half-Step True Ancestors poured into the Quasi-Dao Realm, and immediately descended on the ownerless area of the Quasi-Dao Realm.

Most of the area of the Quasi-Dao Realm was occupied by the True Kingdom, and it was naturally impossible for the True Monarchs and Half-Step True Ancestors of these four transcendent forces to enter the True Kingdoms of other forces, so they could only descend to the Ownerless Region.

However, even in the Unclaimed Area, the area is unimaginably large, enough for the four transcendent forces to establish a stronghold.

In addition, in addition to the Chaos Life Alliance, the number of True Monarchs and Half-Step True Ancestors of the other three transcendent forces is very small, so they don't need any strongholds, and they can act directly.

However, there are too many True Monarchs of the Chaos Life Alliance, and each Chaos Life is too large in size, so it is necessary to establish a stronghold in the Quasi-Dao Realm.

Suddenly, the giant cities of the Chaos Life Alliance were established, and these giant cities were built according to the size of the Chaos Life, each giant city was comparable to the size of a galaxy, and any house was comparable to the sun and stars.

The Chaos Life Alliance did not go to the battlefield ruins as soon as possible due to the large-scale construction of its strongholds, but the True Monarchs and Half-step True Ancestors of the other three transcendent forces couldn't help but go to the battlefield ruins.

Before, they were very curious about the battlefield ruins, but now that they have finally come in, they naturally want to go to the battlefield ruins to have a look, and seek some opportunities by the way.

With their strength, they should be able to sweep everything, even if they encounter the Dao Ancestor incarnation, is it possible that those Dao Ancestor incarnations dare to kill them?

As a member of the transcendent forces, they were not afraid of those Dao Ancestors at all, unless those Dao Ancestors wanted to offend the transcendent forces.

But how many Dao Ancestors dared to offend the transcendent forces?

......

"The four transcendent forces have sent people in?"

Ye Tian got the news and learned it from the Master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

Moreover, the Master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor asked him to be careful of the True Monarchs and Half-Step True Ancestors of the Four Transcendent Forces, not because he was worried about his safety, but because he was worried that he would kill the True Monarchs of the Four Transcendent Forces, in that case, the matter would not be easy to handle.

After all, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor couldn't compete with the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the four transcendent forces, and before the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was not promoted to the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian needed to keep a low profile, even if he wanted to kill someone, he had to be secretive.

Ye Tian was not interested in killing the disciples of the four transcendent forces, but if they deliberately provoked him, then he would not be polite.

After all, now that the Dao Ancestors have no way to descend to the Quasi-Dao Realm, what is he afraid of?

Moreover, he is also the Black Wind Mountain Reserve Peak Master, and he can enter the small realm, but if he hides in the small realm, others will not be able to chase after the small realm, unless they can also become the Black Wind Mountain Reserve Peak Master.

But Ye Tian didn't think that those True Monarchs would be able to pass the assessment of the Preparatory Peak Lord, and his greatest hope was to use the True Ancestor Cultivation as the Peak Master Assessment, but at present, the Quasi-Dao Realm could not accommodate the true True Ancestor powerhouse.

Therefore, in a short period of time, Black Wind Mountain did not want to give birth to a new reserve peak master and peak master.

The Horned Clan's Tuo Long entered the battlefield ruins with the two Half-Step True Ancestors, who were actually his guards.

I think that at the beginning, these two half-step true ancestors were not pure Star Horn Beast Clan, only a little blood of the Star Horn Beast Clan, and they were just born and were only Earth Zun cultivators, but they were promoted to the rank of Nine Star Early Stage Divine General, although they were not as good as those top Dao Ancestors, but they were also very powerful.

To a certain extent, these two half-step True Ancestors were even more geniuses than the pure-blooded Star Horn Clan.

However, compared to Tuolong, these two half-step true ancestors are more ordinary.

Tuo Long is not only a descendant of Dao Ancestor, his talent is also extremely demonic in the Star Horn Clan, his physical talent is even comparable to the genius of the Ten Star God General, known as the first true monarch of the Star Horn Beast Clan in this era, and is stronger than many of the top half-step True Ancestors and even True Ancestors of the Star Horn Clan.

The Horned Beast clan has two forms, one is the beast body, which is the Chaos Life Form, which resembles a unicorn, and the second is the humanoid form.

The humanoid form is the universal form of all living beings in Chaos, and it is also the form that is most suitable for cultivation.

However, when the Starhorn clan really fights to the limit, they will basically show their beast form, and usually walk in chaos in their humanoid form.

At this moment, Tuo Long and the two half-step True Ancestors walked on the battlefield ruins in humanoid form.

"The space here is very stable, even more stable than the space in the clan!"

Tuolong exclaimed.

Along the way, he encountered many ruins, and although there were no treasures left in the ruins, just from the ruins, you can see the fierce battle of the ruins of this battlefield.

In the void, he even sensed the traces of Dao Ancestor's battle from time to time, and in some places he was even afraid to approach.

Suddenly.

A group of True Monarchs in front of them rushed towards them under the leadership of two half-step True Ancestors, and their faces were full of ill will.

"Robbery!"

Two half-step True Ancestors and a group of True Monarchs surrounded the three of Tuolong and threatened in a cold voice.

"Robbery?"

Tuo Long sneered, "Do you know who I am, and how dare you rob me?"

"Who you are, I don't care, anyway, as long as you are not a master of ten thousand laws, we dare to rob, we have so many true monarchs and two half-step true ancestors here, do you dare to resist?"

One of the half-step True Ancestors threatened.

Their group of people is a small group, originally they also belonged to the same true country, coupled with the continuous unity in the battlefield ruins and reaped a lot of benefits, one by one, their strength has increased greatly, and two of them have also become half-step true ancestors, so their greed is getting more and more serious, and they embarked on the road of robbery.

They are also very smart, they don't look for those powerful half-step true ancestors, or they don't look for groups with a lot of people, they only rob small teams of one or a few people.

Tuolong and the others looked very unfamiliar, and they would definitely not be the famous True Monarch and Half-Step True Ancestor, so these people were not afraid at all, and they only regarded Tuolong as a small character.

"Don't make a move!" Tuo Long sent a message to the two half-step True Ancestors.

"Yes, Your Highness!"

Two half-step True Ancestors replied.

"Die!"

Tuolong made a move, and scales appeared on his body, flashing like stars.

This is a star beast god body that belongs to the Star Horn Beast clan, and has powerful attack and defense power.

And Tuolong himself has also refined his physical body to the level of the extreme Dao body, and his divine soul has also been refined to the limit, leaving only the Great Dao not reaching the level of the Complete Great Dao.

Therefore, his strength is terrifying, and he can catch a top true monarch with a single grab.

A Ming Zhenjun turned into a corpse under Tuolong's hands, and even those two half-step True Ancestors were not Tuolong's opponents, and they were severely injured by Tuolong after a while.

In less than five minutes, a corpse was left in the audience, and some True Monarchs tried to use the spatial treasure to shuttle away, but they were intercepted by two half-step True Ancestor Star Horn Beast powerhouses.

At this point, all these people died.

After killing these true monarchs, Tuolong suddenly said.

"Who is the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi in these people?"

Tuolong asked.
